testcase.name: test_admin_today_endpoint_returns_200
testcase.error: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:728: in pytest_fixture_setup return (yield) ^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/anyio/pytest_plugin.py:121: in wrapper yield from runner.run_asyncgen_fixture(local_func, kwargs) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/anyio/_backends/_asyncio.py:2291: in run_asyncgen_fixture fixturevalue: T_Retval = self.get_loop().run_until_complete( /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:654: in run_until_complete return future.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/anyio/_backends/_asyncio.py:2283: in _call_in_runner_task return await future ^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/anyio/_backends/_asyncio.py:2250: in _run_tests_and_fixtures retval = await coro ^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/conftest.py:602: in minimal_search_seed assert me_resp.status_code == 200, f"/auth/me failed: {me_resp.text}" E AssertionError: /auth/me failed: {"error":{"code":"invalid_token","message":"Geçersiz token.","details":null}} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401 Unauthorized]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_today_has_alerts_field
